summary: Specifies Glass Station, a Murano OS room that preserves, renders, and audits the full intellectual terrain of the US intelligence community: institutional structure, bureaucratic process, legal and oversight constraints, institutional ethos/temperament, HUMINT mechanics, interagency friction and deconfliction, liaison and embassy politics, politicization and failure modes, historical change and organizational.
final_use_case: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Glass Station, so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.

instruments.operation: Discovery, creativity, systems thinking, and project generation. Use source library creativity/innovation/network sources to professionalize the project-development account. Vision: Explain Nexus and Personal OS as project-development and discovery infrastructure, not miscellaneous personal tooling. Mechanism: Extract creativity, network, learning, imagination, leadership, and project-generation mechanisms. Plan: Rewrite Nexus and planning pages around upstream/downstream project movement.
